texto: Books are silent friends, and should be treated well. I am proud of my books. I hope that my children will use them and preserve them when I am gone from this world. Human friends may betray you, but not so with books. Books contain wisdom for our understanding, humour for our entertainment, information for our development, and matter for our pleasure.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brenda Mohammed sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Books are silent friends, and should be treated well. I am proud of my books. I hope that my chil…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, books, education, útil em momentos de termino e education.
